data.name: Mirror World
data.detailed_description:
Mirror World is an uncompromising cyberpunk game of science, sex, and intrigue. You begin playing a too-real prototype VR Game. Thrust into leading a group of friends and cyberpunks, you must learn to survive while building a harem, battling corporate and government overlords, and sentient AI systems.

Mirror World is an adult visual novel set in a futuristic cyberpunk world. You begin by playing a prototype VR cyberpunk game with a group of friends. Heavy on story, lore, and character building with animations Mirror World transitions between the real world and the cyberpunk world of the game.


Your cyber and real life are merging unexpectedly, impacting your relationships with fellow gamers and game inhabitants. You pursue romances with fellow gamers and characters (human, android, robot, and other species) in the real and game world, building a harem as you go.

Enter an unforgiving and dangerous world populated with corrupt Governments and corporations, sentient AI, bands of mercenaries, and ultra-rich players. Gather resources and power to survive and thrive or collaborate. Your choices will determine your path. You can pursue romances with your favorites (human, android, alien, you name it), or all of them.

Mirror World offers a story set in a dystopian, futuristic world.

  • Build a harem from a cast of individual characters with distinct personalities, motivations, and attributes.

  • Offers many high-quality animated sex scenes with build-up, creativity, and positions.

  • Many non-sexual animated scenes.

  • Achievements with bonus scenes and renders.

  • Lore codex detailing the game world.

  • Dialogue choices that let you guide your experience.

Thrust into leading a group of friends and cyberpunks you must learn to survive while building a harem, battling corporate and government overlords and sentient AI systems.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or Better (64 bit)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or Better (64 bit)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.6 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 duo or better
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:

  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: OpenGL 2, DirectX 9 or OpenGL ES

  • 作業系統: Steam OS or Ubuntu 16.04
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間

  • OS: Windows 10, 11
  • Processor: Dual Core or Better (64 bit)
  • Memory: 2 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • DirectX: Version 9.0
  • Storage: 4 GB available space
  • Additional Notes: OpenGL 2.0 or DirectX 9.0c compatible
